narrative:
Northfield Ctr Tp township has 4,152 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
